name: Chatterbox TTS (Resemble AI)
description: State-of-the-art open-source text-to-speech. Three model variants: Turbo (350M, low-latency, paralinguistic tags), Standard (English), Multilingual (23 languages). Voice cloning via reference audio clips.
author: HoC Republic

toolDefinitions.name: chatterbox_speak
toolDefinitions.description: Generate speech from text with Chatterbox TTS. Supports 3 model variants: Turbo (fast, paralinguistic), Standard (English), Multilingual (23 languages).

voice_ref.description: Path to reference audio for voice cloning

language.description: Target language code for multilingual model
